# windows-live-captions-stt

Vendored from private repository:

```text
https://github.com/yosef0H4/windows-live-captions-stt
commit 3abb2074947dde0b089a110cb9873a28608e0f3e
```

Local changes make the helper usable from this Uvox workspace by staging Speech SDK DLLs from known local Windows/SDK locations and by providing a package layout under `src/live_captions_stt`.
